capabilities.label: Generate an image from a text prompt
capabilities.description: Text-to-image generation via AI models. Use when an agent must render a NEW visual asset from a natural-language prompt for mockups, illustrations, or user-facing content — not image analysis, captioning, moderation, or editing, which read an existing image and return text or a modified image.

capabilities.label: LLM text completion or chat
capabilities.description: Paid chat or completion APIs for general-purpose language models. Use when an agent needs generative text, reasoning, or tool-use responses from a language model — not task-specific text tools like document extraction (ai.document_extract), translation (ai.translate_text), or embeddings (ai.embeddings).
aliases: chat with a hosted language model
make this writing more formal or polished
summarize or edit a passage of text

capabilities.label: Transcribe audio to text
capabilities.description: Speech-to-text transcription via paid API. Use when an agent converts voice recordings, calls, or audio files into searchable text without hosting your own speech-to-text infrastructure.

capabilities.label: Convert text to speech audio
capabilities.description: Text-to-speech synthesis via paid API. Use when an agent generates spoken audio from text for IVR, accessibility, voice assistants, or outbound voice content.

capabilities.label: Generate text embeddings for retrieval
capabilities.description: Dense vector embeddings for semantic search, clustering, and RAG pipelines. Use when an agent needs to embed sentences or documents for retrieval, ranking, or vector indexing without hosting an embedding model.

capabilities.label: Web-grounded research with citations
capabilities.description: Live web search answers with citations and grounded sources. Use when an agent needs current facts, research summaries, or cited responses instead of static model knowledge.

capabilities.label: Extract structured data from documents
capabilities.description: OCR, PDF parsing, table extraction, and schema-based field extraction from uploaded files. Use when an agent needs to turn invoices, scans, or spreadsheets into structured JSON without running a local OCR pipeline.

capabilities.label: Track category price inflation trends
capabilities.description: Analyze price inflation and trend direction within a retail category. Use when an agent needs category-level inflation trends to explain rising costs, budget impacts, or year-over-year price changes — not economy-wide macroeconomic CPI/inflation indicators (finance.economic_data).
aliases: are grocery prices going up this year
are household goods getting more expensive

capabilities.label: Register or renew domain names
capabilities.description: Domain registration, renewal, and DNS management via micropayment. Use when an agent provisions or renews project domains and DNS without traditional registrar billing flows.

capabilities.label: Create an AI agent email inbox
capabilities.description: Provision a dedicated inbox for an AI agent to send and receive email via micropayment. Use when setting up a mailbox an autonomous agent can poll or webhook for inbound messages before sending replies.
aliases: set up email for my AI agent
bot email address to receive mail

capabilities.label: Send an outbound email
capabilities.description: Send a single email message via micropayment without API keys. Use when an agent must deliver one outbound email for notifications, confirmations, or replies without configuring SMTP or mail APIs.
aliases: send one-off email no API key

capabilities.label: Send a fax via micropayment
capabilities.description: Outbound fax delivery priced per page. Use when an agent must transmit documents to a fax number for legal, healthcare, or legacy business workflows without a fax machine or carrier contract.
aliases: fax a PDF to a number

capabilities.label: Place an AI-powered phone call
capabilities.description: Initiate an outbound AI phone call with natural-language task instructions. Use when an agent must place a real phone call to confirm appointments, follow up with customers, or complete spoken tasks autonomously.

capabilities.label: Call blockchain JSON-RPC
capabilities.description: Execute JSON-RPC calls (eth_call, eth_getBalance, getBlock, and similar methods) against blockchain networks via pay-per-request RPC. Use when an agent submits JSON-RPC methods or reads raw on-chain state without running its own node — not for crypto prices (finance.crypto_spot_price) or wallet token balances (blockchain.token_balance).
aliases: submit a json-rpc method to a chain
read raw on-chain state via json-rpc

capabilities.label: Convert units, measurements, and encodings
capabilities.description: Transform numeric values between measurement units, data-size units, time units, timezone offsets, encodings, and lightweight dev utilities (hash, HMAC, Base64, JWT decode). Use when an agent normalizes quantities or encodings (centimeters to inches, gigabytes to bytes, hex to decimal, SHA-256 hash) — not currency exchange (finance.exchange_rates), financial calculators (compute.financial_calculator), or natural-language translation (ai.translate_text).

capabilities.label: Run personal finance and loan calculators
capabilities.description: Deterministic finance calculators — loan and mortgage payments, compound interest, emergency-fund targets, debt payoff comparisons, retirement and savings projections, and similar numeric personal-finance math. Use when an agent computes a financial scenario, not when it fetches live market quotes (finance.stock_quote) or actionable trade signals (finance.trading_signals).

capabilities.label: Enrich company data from a domain
capabilities.description: Look up company firmographics, industry, and metadata from a domain name. Use when an agent needs business context from a website domain for prospecting, due diligence, or CRM enrichment.

capabilities.label: Answer computational and factual queries
capabilities.description: General computational-knowledge engine for math, science, symbolic calculus, and verified factual computations. Use when an agent needs precise numeric answers, formulas, or verified facts — not unit and encoding conversion (compute.convert_units) or personal-finance and loan math (compute.financial_calculator).

capabilities.label: Validate email deliverability and reputation
capabilities.description: Check whether an email address is deliverable, risky, or disposable before sending. Use when an agent verifies signup emails, cleans lead lists, or reduces bounce rates.

capabilities.label: Convert and look up currency exchange rates
capabilities.description: Live and historical foreign exchange rates between currency pairs. Use when an agent converts amounts, quotes FX rates, or normalizes multi-currency financial data.

capabilities.label: Look up US agricultural statistics
capabilities.description: USDA and NASS agricultural statistics — crop production, yields, prices, and county or state-level farm data from official government sources. Use when an agent needs authoritative US agriculture figures, not general civic address data (gov.civic).

capabilities.label: Track crypto airdrops and eligibility
capabilities.description: Upcoming and recent airdrop calendars — eligibility criteria, deadlines, estimated value, and farming requirements across ecosystems. Use when an agent monitors airdrop opportunities.

capabilities.label: Look up US government and civic data for a location
capabilities.description: Official government and civic information tied to a US address or location — legislative district and sitting representatives, flood-zone designation, jurisdiction, federal or regulatory status, and environmental context (EPA Toxic Release Inventory, county-level pollution exposure). Use when an agent enriches a place with government data, not when it just needs the map coordinates of an address (maps.geocode) or nearby businesses (maps.places).

capabilities.label: Verify identity and public government records
capabilities.description: Official identity verification, KYC and KYB checks, electoral registry validation, and public-record lookups against government databases. Use when an agent confirms a person or company against authoritative registries — not open-web people search (identity.person_search), firmographics from a domain (identity.company_enrich), or location/civic government data (gov.civic).

capabilities.label: Look up legal entity identifiers and corporate hierarchy
capabilities.description: LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) lookup — entity records, corporate ownership graphs, parent-subsidiary hierarchy, and ISIN-to-LEI mapping from official legal-entity registries. Use when an agent verifies legal entity identity, not firmographics from a website domain (identity.company_enrich).

capabilities.label: Search book metadata and bibliographic records
capabilities.description: Book and publication metadata lookup by title, author, ISBN, or free-text query — bibliographic details, editions, and library catalog records. Use when an agent resolves book identity or enriches reading lists, not general web page scraping (web.scrape).
aliases: search books by title and author

capabilities.label: Look up FDA drug labels and medication information
capabilities.description: Regulatory drug-label lookup — FDA-approved indications, dosage, warnings, adverse reactions, and manufacturer details by brand or generic name from official pharmaceutical registries. Use when an agent needs authoritative medication information, not open-web health articles (ai.web_research).

capabilities.label: Look up public holidays by country and date
capabilities.description: Public and bank holiday calendars by country, region, and date range. Use when an agent schedules across locales or checks whether a date is a holiday.
aliases: is this date a public holiday

capabilities.label: Look up NFT collection and token metadata
capabilities.description: NFT collection stats, holder counts, traits, floor prices, events, and individual token metadata. Use when an agent researches NFT collections or assets, not fungible token balances (blockchain.token_balance) or social posts (social.social_data).

capabilities.label: Fetch latest news headlines by topic
capabilities.description: Current news headlines and topical news feeds across tech, business, science, crypto, sports, and world news. Use when an agent needs headline summaries, not long-form cited research (ai.web_research).

capabilities.label: Get live and historical sports scores and schedules
capabilities.description: Sports scores, schedules, standings, and match results across leagues. Use when an agent answers sports outcome questions or monitors fixtures.

capabilities.label: Validate IBAN bank account numbers
capabilities.description: IBAN format and checksum (MOD-97) validation for international bank account numbers. Use when an agent verifies payment rails before transfers, not live account existence, account-holder, or BIC/SWIFT verification.

capabilities.label: Validate VAT and tax identification numbers
capabilities.description: VAT number validation and tax-ID verification for businesses across jurisdictions. Use when an agent checks whether a VAT or tax registration number is valid before invoicing or compliance checks.

capabilities.label: Look up scientific reference data (genes, proteins, chemicals, organisms)
capabilities.description: Resolve scientific entities from public reference databases — genes by symbol, proteins by accession, chemical compounds by identifier or name, and organisms by scientific or common name. Use when an agent needs biology or chemistry reference data, not people (identity.person_search) or companies (identity.company_enrich).
aliases: look up a gene by its official symbol
chemical compound by identifier or name
resolve an organism by scientific or common name

capabilities.label: Look up source code repository data
capabilities.description: Read hosted source-code repository data — repository metadata, commits, pull requests, issues, releases, tags, and programming-language breakdown by owner and name. Use when an agent inspects a code repository's history or contents, not general web pages (web.scrape) or web search (web.search).
aliases: look up a public code repository by owner and name
list pull requests for a repository

capabilities.label: Look up IP address intelligence
capabilities.description: Geolocation, ISP, threat signals, and metadata for an IP address. Use when an agent enriches traffic logs, fraud checks, or security events with IP context.

capabilities.label: Search job postings and hiring feeds
capabilities.description: Query fresh job listings from ATS platforms and job boards with filters. Use when an agent tracks open roles, monitors hiring trends, or surfaces opportunities by title, company, or location.
aliases: jobs posted in the last day

capabilities.label: Search for people and public profiles
capabilities.description: People search and public profile lookup by name, location, or contact hints. Use when an agent enriches leads, finds public profiles, or resolves a person from partial identity signals.
aliases: lookup public profiles for a person
find person by name and city

capabilities.label: Extract text from images (OCR)
capabilities.description: Optical character recognition on images and photos. Use when an agent reads text from screenshots, scans, signs, or photos — distinct from full document parsing pipelines.

capabilities.label: Validate a phone number and carrier info
capabilities.description: Check whether a phone number is valid, reachable, and identify carrier or line type metadata. Use when an agent verifies signup numbers, cleans contact lists, or enriches leads before SMS or voice outreach.

capabilities.label: Translate text between languages
capabilities.description: Machine translation for phrases, documents, or web content. Use when an agent localizes user-facing text, converts foreign-language content, or bridges multilingual workflows.

capabilities.label: Get current weather and forecasts
capabilities.description: Current conditions, multi-day forecasts, and air quality for a location. Use when an agent answers weather questions, plans travel, or checks environmental conditions for a city or coordinates.

capabilities.label: Scrape or fetch a web page
capabilities.description: Fetch and extract content from a public URL via micropayment. Use when an agent needs raw page HTML, rendered content, or structured scrape output for research, monitoring, or downstream parsing.

capabilities.label: Look up DNS records and WHOIS for domains
capabilities.description: DNS record and WHOIS registration data for one or more domains. Use when an agent audits domain configuration, checks registrar details, or investigates hostname ownership.

capabilities.label: Solve CAPTCHA challenges for automation
capabilities.description: Automated CAPTCHA solving for web agents, scrapers, and form bots. Use when a headless workflow hits reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, Turnstile, or image challenges and needs a paid solve-and-continue step.

capabilities.label: Manipulate PDF documents
capabilities.description: PDF document utilities — add watermarks, compress files, merge or split pages, and similar file transforms. Use when an agent processes PDF assets, not OCR text extraction (ai.ocr).

capabilities.label: Build, test, and sign webhook payloads
capabilities.description: Webhook utilities — construct payloads, sign with HMAC, send test events, validate delivery, and dispatch HTTP callbacks. Use when an agent integrates or debugs webhook flows.

capabilities.label: Get crypto market intelligence and sentiment
capabilities.description: Crypto market intelligence beyond a single quote — trending altcoins, market sentiment and momentum, trade history, and cross-chain token context. Use when an agent monitors market narrative or portfolio activity, not raw protocol TVL (blockchain.defi_analytics) or actionable trade signals (finance.trading_signals).

capabilities.label: Get cryptocurrency spot price
capabilities.description: Fetch the current spot price for one or more crypto assets. Use when an agent needs a live fiat-denominated spot quote for trading, portfolio valuation, or price-aware routing — not trading signals (finance.trading_signals), risk or on-chain flow analytics (blockchain.onchain_analytics), prediction markets, or news. Spot price only.
aliases: current token price without API key
how much is bitcoin worth now
what's the price of BTC right now

capabilities.label: Get DeFi protocol and yield analytics
capabilities.description: DeFi protocol directory data — TVL, yields, protocol metadata, chain-level DeFi stats, and liquidity analytics. Use when an agent researches protocols and DeFi markets, not wallet-level flows (blockchain.onchain_analytics) or single-token spot prices (finance.crypto_spot_price).

capabilities.label: Track on-chain smart money and wallet analytics
capabilities.description: On-chain analytics for smart-money flows, wallet profiling, token holder metrics, and fund movements. Use when an agent researches crypto wallets, token accumulation, or labeled on-chain activity, not protocol/market aggregates (blockchain.defi_analytics) or network gas and health telemetry (blockchain.network_metrics).

capabilities.label: Look up stock price quotes by ticker
capabilities.description: Current and recent equity quotes, prices, and trading metadata by ticker symbol. Use when an agent answers stock price questions, monitors portfolios, or grounds financial analysis in live market data.

capabilities.label: Look up wallet token balances
capabilities.description: On-chain token and wallet balance lookups across EVM and non-EVM chains. Use when an agent needs ERC-20 holdings, multi-chain portfolio value in USD, or wallet inventory before transfers, portfolio checks, or treasury reporting.
aliases: what tokens does this wallet hold
how much USDC does this wallet hold

capabilities.label: Browse prediction and event markets
capabilities.description: Query prediction and event markets — list markets, event outcomes, current odds and outcome prices, and resolution status. Use when an agent wants the market-implied probability or price of a real-world event outcome — not crypto spot prices (finance.crypto_spot_price), equity quotes (finance.stock_quote), or wallet flows (blockchain.onchain_analytics).
aliases: what are the odds on this outcome

capabilities.label: Get trading signals and strategy performance
capabilities.description: Actionable trading signals and track records — entry / exit / close signals, buy-sell calls, realized P&L, and strategy or agent performance leaderboards. Use when an agent wants a trade recommendation or a performance record, not raw prices (finance.crypto_spot_price / finance.stock_quote) or on-chain wallet metrics (blockchain.onchain_analytics).
aliases: agent trading leaderboard ranked by profit

capabilities.label: Get macroeconomic indicators and economic data
capabilities.description: Macroeconomic time series and indicators — central-bank and government economic series, regional and national economic data, recession-signal dashboards, and point-in-time (vintage) economic releases. Use when an agent needs economy-wide indicators (GDP, CPI, rates, employment), not single-company equity quotes (finance.stock_quote).

capabilities.label: Get trader positioning and market reference reports
capabilities.description: CFTC Commitments of Traders (COT) and trader-positioning datasets — commitments-of-traders positioning, daily market briefs, sector positioning, and macro positioning context. Use when an agent needs positioning and market-structure reference data, not actionable trade calls (finance.trading_signals) or a single ticker quote (finance.stock_quote).

capabilities.label: Monitor stablecoin pegs and supply flows
capabilities.description: Stablecoin price-peg monitoring, depeg alerts, and supply-flow telemetry across chains. Use when an agent watches USDC, USDT, DAI, or other dollar-pegged stablecoins for peg deviation — not generic crypto spot prices (finance.crypto_spot_price) or wallet balances (blockchain.token_balance).

capabilities.label: Search local businesses and points of interest
capabilities.description: Find restaurants, stores, hotels, and other places with ratings, hours, contact info, and location metadata. Use when an agent discovers nearby businesses or enriches location context for users — not for resolving a street address to coordinates (maps.geocode).

capabilities.label: Geocode an address to coordinates (and reverse)
capabilities.description: Convert a street address or place name into latitude/longitude coordinates (forward geocoding), or turn coordinates back into a formatted postal address (reverse geocoding). Use when an agent needs the map point for an address, or a human-readable address for a lat/long pair — not for discovering nearby businesses (maps.places) and not for locating an IP address (devtools.ip_lookup).
aliases: geocode this street address into latitude and longitude
what are the coordinates of this address
resolve a postal address to a geo point
turn a latitude longitude into a formatted address
geocode a place name to a map point

capabilities.label: Competitive pricing landscape for a category
capabilities.description: View all products in a category with competitive pricing across retailers. Use when an agent needs a category-wide market scan for competitive positioning, pricing research, or shelf analysis — not company-level competitor/business analysis (identity.company_enrich).
aliases: who competes in this product space

capabilities.label: Fetch social media posts and comments
capabilities.description: Retrieve profiles, posts, comments, and engagement from major social platforms. Use when an agent monitors brand sentiment, analyzes creator content, or pulls thread data for research — not e-commerce product or marketplace listings (commerce).

capabilities.label: Look up movie and film database records
capabilities.description: Movie and film metadata lookup — titles, cast, ratings, and database records from movie catalogs. Use when an agent resolves film identity or enriches entertainment context.

capabilities.label: Look up anime characters and series details
capabilities.description: Anime and manga metadata lookup — character search, series details, and related catalog records. Use when an agent resolves anime identity or enriches entertainment research.

capabilities.label: Send an SMS text message
capabilities.description: Outbound SMS for alerts, reminders, and one-time verification codes. Use when an agent must text a phone number without provisioning carrier contracts.
aliases: send text without a carrier contract

capabilities.label: Search homes for sale and rentals
capabilities.description: Find property listings, rental comps, and home value estimates in the US. Use when an agent needs residential sale or rental listings for a city, zip, or neighborhood to answer relocation, investment, or housing budget questions.

capabilities.label: Search the web for organic results
capabilities.description: Real-time web search returning organic links, snippets, knowledge panels, and related queries. Use when an agent needs current SERP results, source URLs, or quick fact-finding across the open web.

capabilities.label: Compare retail price across stores
capabilities.description: Find the lowest current price for a product across multiple retailers. Use when an agent must compare the same SKU across stores before recommending where a user should buy.

capabilities.label: Find discounted products in a category
capabilities.description: Discover current deals and discounts within a product category. Use when an agent needs to surface discounted or on-sale items under a budget for shopping recommendations or deal scouting.

capabilities.label: Look up trading card game sets and cards
capabilities.description: Trading card game catalog metadata — card sets, individual cards, bulk card lookups, and pricing across Pokemon, Magic, Yu-Gi-Oh, and other collectible card games. Use when an agent researches collectible card inventory, not general retail product deals (commerce.find_deals).

capabilities.label: Detect recent price drops on a product
capabilities.description: Check whether a product's price has dropped recently across tracked retailers. Use when an agent needs to detect recent markdowns on a tracked SKU before alerting a user to buy.

capabilities.label: Get historical price trends for a product
capabilities.description: Retrieve price history over time for a specific product query. Use when an agent needs historical pricing trends to judge buy timing, volatility, or whether an item was cheaper before.
aliases: how has price changed over time

capabilities.label: Find social media influencers by niche
capabilities.description: Search Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube creator profiles by niche, location, follower count, and engagement for marketing campaigns. Use when an agent needs creator discovery filtered by audience, niche, or geography for outreach or campaign planning.
aliases: find creators across instagram tiktok youtube

capabilities.label: Host files and static websites
capabilities.description: Upload files or deploy static websites with permanent CDN URLs via micropayment. Use when an agent needs to publish assets or a static site and return a permanent public URL without managing cloud storage accounts.

capabilities.label: Read and write agent memory
capabilities.description: Persistent key-value memory for autonomous agents — read, write, list, and delete entries in a namespace, and query another agent's shared memory. Use when an agent stores or recalls its own state across calls, not file or object hosting (cloud.hosting).
aliases: list keys in a memory namespace

capabilities.label: Register and discover agents in a marketplace
capabilities.description: Agent marketplace and registry operations — register an agent, fetch an agent's profile, and post or read reviews and reputation of agents. Use for an agent-to-agent directory and reputation system, not generic service or API catalogs, buyer menus, or human people search (identity.person_search).
aliases: register an agent in the marketplace
post a review of another agent
discover other agents in the marketplace

capabilities.label: Look up traveler reviews for hotels, restaurants, and attractions
capabilities.description: Look up traveler reviews, ratings, and photos for hotels, restaurants, and attractions. Use when an agent surfaces traveler feedback or compares venues by reputation — not for operational business discovery like hours, contact info, or nearby POIs (maps.places).

capabilities.label: Search flights, airports, and aviation data
capabilities.description: Flight status tracking, airport directory lookups, route search, and aviation schedules. Use when an agent plans travel logistics or tracks flights — not general POI or restaurant search (maps.places) or hotel review lookup (travel.place_reviews).
aliases: flight search by route and date

capabilities.label: Extract webpage content as clean markdown
capabilities.description: Convert a public URL into clean text or markdown, including JavaScript-rendered pages. Use when an agent needs readable article content, docs, or LLM-ready page text instead of raw HTML.

capabilities.label: Capture a website screenshot
capabilities.description: Take a full-page or viewport screenshot of any public URL via micropayment. Use when an agent needs a pixel-accurate visual capture of a public webpage for QA, archiving, or showing users what a site looks like.

capabilities.label: Moderate text and images for safety
capabilities.description: Content moderation and safety classification — flag toxicity, hate speech, harassment, sexual or NSFW material, violence, and self-harm across user or model text and images. Use when an agent screens content before publishing or responding, not on-chain token risk or smart-contract safety audits.

capabilities.label: Count LLM tokens for a prompt
capabilities.description: Tokenize text and count LLM tokens (BPE or tiktoken) for GPT, Claude, and Llama models to budget context windows and estimate request cost. Use when an agent measures prompt size before a completion, not running the completion itself (ai.llm_complete).

capabilities.label: Get blockchain gas prices and network health metrics
capabilities.description: Live network telemetry for blockchains — gas price and EIP-1559 fee tiers, gas oracles, mempool congestion, block height and time, TPS and throughput, finality, and validator or chain health. Use when an agent reads network-level conditions to time or price a transaction, not wallet and token analytics (blockchain.onchain_analytics) or raw JSON-RPC calls (blockchain.rpc).

capabilities.label: Detect and redact PII in text
capabilities.description: Find and redact personally identifiable information — names, emails, phone numbers, SSNs, credit cards, IBANs, and IP addresses — for privacy, GDPR or HIPAA compliance, and safe logging. Use when an agent sanitizes or classifies sensitive text, not toxic/unsafe content screening (ai.moderate_content).

capabilities.label: Generate UUIDs, tokens, passwords, and random values
capabilities.description: Mint fresh identifiers and secrets — UUID, ULID, GUID, nanoid, random strings, random bytes, random integers, secure passwords and passphrases, and API keys or tokens. Use when an agent needs a newly generated value, not encoding or unit conversion (compute.convert_units), and not password strength or breach checks.

capabilities.label: Convert files between data formats
capabilities.description: Convert documents and data files between formats — JSON to YAML, XML to JSON, CSV to JSON, XML or Markdown to DOCX or Word, Excel to CSV, and image transcoding between PNG, JPG, WebP, and AVIF. Use when an agent changes a file's format or serialization, not numeric or unit conversion (compute.convert_units) and not PDF-only edits (devtools.pdf_manipulate).

capabilities.label: Transcode and convert audio and video
capabilities.description: Convert audio and video between formats and extract media — MP4 to MP3, extract audio, generate subtitles from video, grab a video frame or thumbnail, trim, concatenate, or change playback speed. Use when an agent reformats or processes A/V media, not transcription to text (ai.speech_to_text).
